action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 7 successfully trained DINOv2 for 2 epochs on 4 GPUs without DDP crashes. Best source-domain validation accuracy was 0.5293 (EMA after epoch 0). The checkpoint checkpoints/best.pt was saved. We still need the actual Quickdraw test accuracy to establish the DINOv2 baseline and decide how to scale training. Analysis: The pipeline is now stable. Submitting eval is the highest-priority next step to measure iteration time end-to-end and get a target-domain score. Decision: Submit the current best checkpoint for evaluation immediately. Based on the returned accuracy and remaining budget, I will then scale epochs and tune hyperparameters.
